title: Organising Code with Functions
description: Package logic into reusable functions, control their inputs and outputs, and pull in code from Python's standard library.

lessons.title: Defining and Calling Functions
objectives: Define and call a function with parameters
Return a value and explain how return differs from print
Use functions to remove duplication and centralise logic

lessons.title: Arguments, Defaults, and Keyword Arguments
objectives: Pass arguments positionally and by keyword
Avoid the mutable-default trap and recognise *args / **kwargs

lessons.title: Modules, Imports, and the Standard Library
objectives: Import modules and specific names from the standard library
